name: SIGMA - Clfs.SYS Loaded By Process Located In a Potential Suspicious Location
author: X__Junior
description: Detects Clfs.sys being loaded by a process running from a potentially suspicious location. Clfs.sys is loaded as part of many CVEs exploits that targets Common Log File.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\clfs.sys" and ((Image like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*")) or ((Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Contacts\\*") or (Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Pictures\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - DLL Loaded From Suspicious Location Via Cmspt.EXE
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects cmstp loading "dll" or "ocx" files from suspicious locations
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\cmstp.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\PerfLogs\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\*", "*\\Users\\*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*C:\\Temp\\*")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*.dll", "*.ocx")))

name: SIGMA - Amsi.DLL Loaded Via LOLBIN Process
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects loading of "Amsi.dll" by a living of the land process. This could be an indication of a "PowerShell without PowerShell" attack
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\amsi.dll" and (Image like~ ("*\\ExtExport.exe", "*\\odbcconf.exe", "*\\rundll32.exe")))

name: SIGMA - Potential Azure Browser SSO Abuse
author: Den Iuzvyk
description:
Detects abusing Azure Browser SSO by requesting OAuth 2.0 refresh tokens for an Azure-AD-authenticated Windows user (i.e. the machine is joined to Azure AD and a user logs in with their Azure AD account) wanting to perform SSO authentication in the browser.
An attacker can use this to authenticate to Azure AD in a browser as that user.
false_positives: False positives are expected since this rules is only looking for the DLL load event. This rule is better used in correlation with related activity
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\MicrosoftAccountTokenProvider.dll" and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) and Image:"*\\BackgroundTaskHost.exe")) and (not (((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*")) and Image:"*\\IDE\\devenv.exe") or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (Image:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or Image:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (Image like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\OneDrive.exe" or (?Image == null))))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Renamed Comsvcs DLL Loaded By Rundll32
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects rundll32 loading a renamed comsvcs.dll to dump process memory
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image:"*\\rundll32.exe" and (Hashes like~ ("*IMPHASH=eed93054cb555f3de70eaa9787f32ebb*", "*IMPHASH=5e0dbdec1fce52daae251a110b4f309d*", "*IMPHASH=eadbccbb324829acb5f2bbe87e5549a8*", "*IMPHASH=407ca0f7b523319d758a40d7c0193699*", "*IMPHASH=281d618f4e6271e527e6386ea6f748de*"))) and (not ImageLoaded:"*\\comsvcs.dll"))

name: SIGMA - CredUI.DLL Loaded By Uncommon Process
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects loading of "credui.dll" and related DLLs by an uncommon process. Attackers might leverage this DLL for potential use of "CredUIPromptForCredentials" or "CredUnPackAuthenticationBufferW".
false_positives: Other legitimate processes loading those DLLs in your environment.
query: any where EventID:7 and (((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\credui.dll", "*\\wincredui.dll")) or (OriginalFileName like~ ("credui.dll", "wincredui.dll"))) and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\ImmersiveControlPanel\\SystemSettings.exe", "C:\\Windows\\regedit.exe")))) and (not (Image:"*\\opera_autoupdate.exe" or (Image like~ ("*\\procexp64.exe", "*\\procexp.exe")) or (Image:"C:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Teams\\*" and Image:"*\\Teams.exe") or (Image:"C:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Unsigned Dbghelp/Dbgcore DLL Loaded
author: Perez Diego (@darkquassar), oscd.community, Ecco
description:
Detects the load of dbghelp/dbgcore DLL (used to make memory dumps) by suspicious processes.
Tools like ProcessHacker and some attacker tradecract use MiniDumpWriteDump API found in dbghelp.dll or dbgcore.dll.
As an example, SilentTrynity C2 Framework has a module that leverages this API to dump the contents of Lsass.exe and transfer it over the network back to the attacker's machine.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\dbghelp.dll", "*\\dbgcore.dll")) and Signed:"false")

name: SIGMA - PCRE.NET Package Image Load
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects processes loading modules related to PCRE.NET package
query: any where EventID:7 and ImageLoaded:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\ba9ea7344a4a5f591d6e5dc32a13494b\\*"

name: SIGMA - Load Of RstrtMgr.DLL By A Suspicious Process
author: Luc Génaux
description:
Detects the load of RstrtMgr DLL (Restart Manager) by a suspicious process.
This library has been used during ransomware campaigns to kill processes that would prevent file encryption by locking them (e.g. Conti ransomware, Cactus ransomware). It has also recently been seen used by the BiBi wiper for Windows.
It could also be used for anti-analysis purposes by shut downing specific processes.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*\\RstrtMgr.dll" or OriginalFileName:"RstrtMgr.dll") and ((Image like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*")) or ((Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\Contacts\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Load Of RstrtMgr.DLL By An Uncommon Process
author: Luc Génaux
description:
Detects the load of RstrtMgr DLL (Restart Manager) by an uncommon process.
This library has been used during ransomware campaigns to kill processes that would prevent file encryption by locking them (e.g. Conti ransomware, Cactus ransomware). It has also recently been seen used by the BiBi wiper for Windows.
It could also be used for anti-analysis purposes by shut downing specific processes.
false_positives: Other legitimate Windows processes not currently listed
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*\\RstrtMgr.dll" or OriginalFileName:"RstrtMgr.dll") and (not ((Image like~ ("*:\\$WINDOWS.~BT\\*", "*:\\$WinREAgent\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\ProgramData\\*", "*:\\Windows\\explorer.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\SoftwareDistribution\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysNative\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*", "*:\\WUDownloadCache\\*")) or ((Image:"*:\\Users\\*" and Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\is-*" and Image:"*.tmp\\*") and Image:"*.tmp") or Image:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*")))

name: SIGMA - Diagnostic Library Sdiageng.DLL Loaded By Msdt.EXE
author: Greg (rule)
description: Detects both of CVE-2022-30190 (Follina) and DogWalk vulnerabilities exploiting msdt.exe binary to load the "sdiageng.dll" library
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\msdt.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\sdiageng.dll")

name: SIGMA - PowerShell Core DLL Loaded By Non PowerShell Process
author: Tom Kern, oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Tim Shelton, Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description:
Detects loading of essential DLLs used by PowerShell by non-PowerShell process.
Detects behavior similar to meterpreter's "load powershell" extension.
false_positives: Used by some .NET binaries, minimal on user workstation.
Used by Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Description:"System.Management.Automation" or OriginalFileName:"System.Management.Automation.dll" or (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\System.Management.Automation.dll", "*\\System.Management.Automation.ni.dll"))) and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7-preview\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe")) or ((Image like~ ("*C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.PowerShellPreview*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.PowerShellPreview*")) and Image:"*\\pwsh.exe") or (Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\dsac.exe", "C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\RemoteFXvGPUDisablement.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\runscripthelper.exe", "C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\sdiagnhost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\ServerManager.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\SyncAppvPublishingServer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\winrshost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\wsmprovhost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\winrshost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\wsmprovhost.exe")) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\*")) and Image:"*\\mscorsvw.exe"))) and (not (((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio*")) and Image:"*\\IDE\\Ssms.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft SQL Server\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft SQL Server\\*")) and Image:"*\\Tools\\Binn\\SQLPS.exe") or Image:"*\\Citrix\\ConfigSync\\ConfigSyncRun.exe" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*")) or Image:"C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\choco.exe*" or (Image:"C:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent\\*" and (Image like~ ("*\\thor64.exe", "*\\thor.exe"))) or (?Image == null))))

name: SIGMA - Time Travel Debugging Utility Usage - Image
author: Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative
description: Detects usage of Time Travel Debugging Utility. Adversaries can execute malicious processes and dump processes, such as lsass.exe, via tttracer.exe.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\ttdrecord.dll", "*\\ttdwriter.dll", "*\\ttdloader.dll"))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Volume Shadow Copy Vssapi.dll Load
author: frack113
description: Detects the image load of VSS DLL by uncommon executables
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\vssapi.dll" and (not (((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\ImmersiveControlPanel\\SystemSettings.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Temp\\{*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*")) or (?Image == null))) and (not (Image:"C:\\ProgramData\\Package Cache\\*" or (Image:"*\\temp\\is-*" and Image:"*\\avira_system_speedup.tmp*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potentially Suspicious Volume Shadow Copy Vsstrace.dll Load
author: frack113
description: Detects the image load of VSS DLL by uncommon executables
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\vsstrace.dll" and (not (((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\ImmersiveControlPanel\\SystemSettings.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Temp\\{*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Package Cache\\{*"))) or (?Image == null) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*")))) and (not (Image:"*\\temp\\is-*" and Image:"*\\avira_system_speedup.tmp*")))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Volume Shadow Copy VSS_PS.dll Load
author: Markus Neis, @markus_neis
description:
Detects the image load of vss_ps.dll by uncommon executables. This DLL is used by the Volume Shadow Copy Service (VSS) to manage shadow copies of files and volumes.
It is often abused by attackers to delete or manipulate shadow copies, which can hinder forensic investigations and data recovery efforts.
The fact that it is loaded by processes that are not typically associated with VSS operations can indicate suspicious activity.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\vss_ps.dll" and (not ((Image:"C:\\Windows\\*" and (Image like~ ("*\\clussvc.exe", "*\\dismhost.exe", "*\\dllhost.exe", "*\\inetsrv\\appcmd.exe", "*\\inetsrv\\iissetup.exe", "*\\msiexec.exe", "*\\rundll32.exe", "*\\searchindexer.exe", "*\\srtasks.exe", "*\\svchost.exe", "*\\System32\\SystemPropertiesAdvanced.exe", "*\\taskhostw.exe", "*\\thor.exe", "*\\thor64.exe", "*\\tiworker.exe", "*\\vssvc.exe", "*\\vssadmin.exe", "*\\WmiPrvSE.exe", "*\\wsmprovhost.exe"))) or (CommandLine:"C:\\$WinREAgent\\Scratch\\*" and CommandLine:"*\\dismhost.exe {*") or (?Image == null))) and (not (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - HackTool - SharpEvtMute DLL Load
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects the load of EvtMuteHook.dll, a key component of SharpEvtHook, a tool that tampers with the Windows event logs
false_positives: Other DLLs with the same Imphash
query: any where EventID:7 and Hashes:"*IMPHASH=330768A4F172E10ACB6287B87289D83B*"

name: SIGMA - HackTool - SILENTTRINITY Stager DLL Load
author: Aleksey Potapov, oscd.community
description: Detects SILENTTRINITY stager dll loading activity
query: any where EventID:7 and Description:"*st2stager*"

name: SIGMA - Potential DCOM InternetExplorer.Application DLL Hijack - Image Load
author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g, Open Threat Research (OTR), wagga
description: Detects potential DLL hijack of "iertutil.dll" found in the DCOM InternetExplorer.Application Class
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\Internet Explorer\\iertutil.dll")

name: SIGMA - Unsigned Image Loaded Into LSASS Process
author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, oscd.community
description: Loading unsigned image (DLL, EXE) into LSASS process
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\lsass.exe" and Signed:"false")

name: SIGMA - DotNET Assembly DLL Loaded Via Office Application
author: Antonlovesdnb
description: Detects any assembly DLL being loaded by an Office Product
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\excel.exe", "*\\mspub.exe", "*\\onenote.exe", "*\\onenoteim.exe", "*\\outlook.exe", "*\\powerpnt.exe", "*\\winword.exe")) and ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\assembly\\*")

name: SIGMA - CLR DLL Loaded Via Office Applications
author: Antonlovesdnb
description: Detects CLR DLL being loaded by an Office Product
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\excel.exe", "*\\mspub.exe", "*\\outlook.exe", "*\\onenote.exe", "*\\onenoteim.exe", "*\\powerpnt.exe", "*\\winword.exe")) and ImageLoaded:"*\\clr.dll*")

name: SIGMA - GAC DLL Loaded Via Office Applications
author: Antonlovesdnb
description: Detects any GAC DLL being loaded by an Office Product
false_positives: Legitimate macro usage. Add the appropriate filter according to your environment
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\excel.exe", "*\\mspub.exe", "*\\onenote.exe", "*\\onenoteim.exe", "*\\outlook.exe", "*\\powerpnt.exe", "*\\winword.exe")) and ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\assembly\\GAC_MSIL*")

name: SIGMA - Microsoft Excel Add-In Loaded From Uncommon Location
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects Microsoft Excel loading an Add-In (.xll) file from an uncommon location
false_positives: Some tuning might be required to allow or remove certain locations used by the rule if you consider them as safe locations
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\excel.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\Desktop\\*", "*\\Downloads\\*", "*\\Perflogs\\*", "*\\Temp\\*", "*\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Windows\\Tasks\\*")) and ImageLoaded:"*.xll")

name: SIGMA - Active Directory Kerberos DLL Loaded Via Office Application
author: Antonlovesdnb
description: Detects Kerberos DLL being loaded by an Office Product
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\excel.exe", "*\\mspub.exe", "*\\onenote.exe", "*\\onenoteim.exe", "*\\outlook.exe", "*\\powerpnt.exe", "*\\winword.exe")) and ImageLoaded:"*\\kerberos.dll")

name: SIGMA - Microsoft VBA For Outlook Addin Loaded Via Outlook
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects outlvba (Microsoft VBA for Outlook Addin) DLL being loaded by the outlook process
false_positives: Legitimate macro usage. Add the appropriate filter according to your environment
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\outlook.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\outlvba.dll")

name: SIGMA - PowerShell Core DLL Loaded Via Office Application
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects PowerShell core DLL being loaded by an Office Product
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\excel.exe", "*\\mspub.exe", "*\\outlook.exe", "*\\onenote.exe", "*\\onenoteim.exe", "*\\powerpnt.exe", "*\\winword.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\System.Management.Automation.Dll*", "*\\System.Management.Automation.ni.Dll*")))

name: SIGMA - VBA DLL Loaded Via Office Application
author: Antonlovesdnb
description: Detects VB DLL's loaded by an office application. Which could indicate the presence of VBA Macros.
false_positives: Legitimate macro usage. Add the appropriate filter according to your environment
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\excel.exe", "*\\mspub.exe", "*\\onenote.exe", "*\\onenoteim.exe", "*\\outlook.exe", "*\\powerpnt.exe", "*\\winword.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\VBE7.DLL", "*\\VBEUI.DLL", "*\\VBE7INTL.DLL")))

name: SIGMA - Remote DLL Load Via Rundll32.EXE
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects a remote DLL load event via "rundll32.exe".
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\rundll32.exe" and ImageLoaded:"\\\\*")

name: SIGMA - WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers Activity Via Scrcons.EXE DLL Load
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects signs of the WMI script host process "scrcons.exe" loading scripting DLLs which could indicates WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers EventConsumers activity.
false_positives: Dell computers on some versions register an event consumer that is known to cause false positives when brightness is changed by the corresponding keyboard button
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\scrcons.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\vbscript.dll", "*\\wbemdisp.dll", "*\\wshom.ocx", "*\\scrrun.dll")))

name: SIGMA - Potential 7za.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "7za.dll"
false_positives: Legitimate third party application located in "AppData" may leverage this DLL to offer 7z compression functionality and may generate false positives. Apply additional filters as needed.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\7za.dll" and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Abusable DLL Potential Sideloading From Suspicious Location
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of DLLs that are known to be abused from suspicious locations
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\coreclr.dll", "*\\facesdk.dll", "*\\HPCustPartUI.dll", "*\\libcef.dll", "*\\ZIPDLL.dll")) and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*")) or ((ImageLoaded:"*:\\Users\\*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (ImageLoaded:"*:\\Users\\*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (ImageLoaded:"*:\\Users\\*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\Contacts\\*") or (ImageLoaded:"*:\\Users\\*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\Pictures\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential Antivirus Software DLL Sideloading
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Wietze Beukema (project and research)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of antivirus software suchas McAfee, Symantec...etc
false_positives: Applications that load the same dlls mentioned in the detection section. Investigate them and filter them out if a lot FPs are caused.
Dell SARemediation plugin folder (C:\Program Files\Dell\SARemediation\plugin\log.dll) is known to contain the 'log.dll' file.
The Canon MyPrinter folder 'C:\Program Files\Canon\MyPrinter\' is known to contain the 'log.dll' file
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*\\log.dll" and (not ((ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Bitdefender Antivirus Free\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Bitdefender Antivirus Free\\*")) or (Image:"C:\\Program Files\\Dell\\SARemediation\\audit\\TelemetryUtility.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Dell\\SARemediation\\plugin\\log.dll", "C:\\Program Files\\Dell\\SARemediation\\audit\\log.dll"))) or ImageLoaded:"C:\\Program Files\\Canon\\MyPrinter\\*" or (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\AVAST Software\\Avast\\log.dll", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\AVAST Software\\Avast\\log.dll")) or (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\AVG\\Antivirus\\log.dll", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\AVG\\Antivirus\\log.dll"))))) or (ImageLoaded:"*\\qrt.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\F-Secure\\Anti-Virus\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\F-Secure\\Anti-Virus\\*")))) or ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\ashldres.dll", "*\\lockdown.dll", "*\\vsodscpl.dll")) and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\McAfee\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\McAfee\\*")))) or (ImageLoaded:"*\\vftrace.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\CyberArk\\Endpoint Privilege Manager\\Agent\\x32\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\CyberArk\\Endpoint Privilege Manager\\Agent\\x32\\*")))) or (ImageLoaded:"*\\wsc.dll" and (not ((ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\program Files\\AVAST Software\\Avast\\*", "C:\\program Files (x86)\\AVAST Software\\Avast\\*")) or (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\AVG\\Antivirus\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\AVG\\Antivirus\\*"))))) or (ImageLoaded:"*\\tmdbglog.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\program Files\\Trend Micro\\Titanium\\*", "C:\\program Files (x86)\\Trend Micro\\Titanium\\*")))) or (ImageLoaded:"*\\DLPPREM32.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\program Files\\ESET*", "C:\\program Files (x86)\\ESET*")))))

name: SIGMA - Potential appverifUI.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "appverifUI.dll"
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\appverifUI.dll" and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\appverif.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\appverif.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Aruba Network Service Potential DLL Sideloading
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading activity via the Aruba Networks Virtual Intranet Access "arubanetsvc.exe" process using DLL Search Order Hijacking
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image:"*\\arubanetsvc.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\wtsapi32.dll", "*\\msvcr100.dll", "*\\msvcp100.dll", "*\\dbghelp.dll", "*\\dbgcore.dll", "*\\wininet.dll", "*\\iphlpapi.dll", "*\\version.dll", "*\\cryptsp.dll", "*\\cryptbase.dll", "*\\wldp.dll", "*\\profapi.dll", "*\\sspicli.dll", "*\\winsta.dll", "*\\dpapi.dll"))) and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential AVKkid.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "AVKkid.dll"
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\AVKkid.dll" and (not ((Image like~ ("*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\G DATA\\*", "*C:\\Program Files\\G DATA\\*")) and Image:"*\\AVKKid.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\G DATA\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\G DATA\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Potential CCleanerDU.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "CCleanerDU.dll"

name: SIGMA - Potential JLI.dll Side-Loading
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects potential DLL side-loading of jli.dll.
JLI.dll has been observed being side-loaded by Java processes by various threat actors, including APT41, XWorm,
and others in order to load malicious payloads in context of legitimate Java processes.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\jli.dll" and (not ((ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*")) and Description:"OpenJDK Platform binary" and OriginalFileName:"jli.dll" and Product:"OpenJDK Platform*" and Signed:"true")) and (not ImageLoaded:"C:\\eclipse\\plugins\\*"))

description: Detects potential DLL sideloading using JUSTSYSTEMS Japanese word processor

name: SIGMA - Potential DLL Sideloading Of KeyScramblerIE.DLL Via KeyScrambler.EXE
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
description:
Detects potential DLL side loading of "KeyScramblerIE.dll" by "KeyScrambler.exe".
Various threat actors and malware have been found side loading a masqueraded "KeyScramblerIE.dll" through "KeyScrambler.exe".
query: any where EventID:7 and (((Image like~ ("*\\KeyScrambler.exe", "*\\KeyScramblerLogon.exe")) and ImageLoaded:"*\\KeyScramblerIE.dll") and (not (((Image like~ ("*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\KeyScrambler\\*", "*C:\\Program Files\\KeyScrambler\\*")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\KeyScrambler\\*", "*C:\\Program Files\\KeyScrambler\\*"))) or (Signature:"QFX Software Corporation" and SignatureStatus:"Valid"))))

query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\mscorsvc.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential DLL Sideloading Of Non-Existent DLLs From System Folders
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), SBousseaden
description:
Detects DLL sideloading of system DLLs that are not present on the system by default (at least not in system directories).
Usually this technique is used to achieve UAC bypass or privilege escalation.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*:\\Windows\\System32\\TSMSISrv.dll", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\TSVIPSrv.dll", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\wbem\\wbemcomn.dll", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\WLBSCTRL.dll", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\wow64log.dll", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\WptsExtensions.dll")) and (not (Signed:"true" and SignatureStatus:"Valid" and Signature:"Microsoft Windows")))

name: SIGMA - Microsoft Office DLL Sideload
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Wietze Beukema (project and research)
description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of Microsoft Office from non standard location
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\outllib.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\OFFICE*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\OFFICE*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\Root\\OFFICE*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\Root\\OFFICE*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential Python DLL SideLoading
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of Python DLL files.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\python39.dll", "*\\python310.dll", "*\\python311.dll", "*\\python312.dll")) and (not (((ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Python3*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Python3*")) or ImageLoaded:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python3*") or (Product:"Python" and Signed:"true" and Description:"Python" and Company:"Python Software Foundation"))) and (not (ImageLoaded:"C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*" or ImageLoaded:"C:\\ProgramData\\Anaconda3\\*" or (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\cpython\\externals\\*", "*\\cpython\\PCbuild\\*")) or (ImageLoaded:"C:\\Users*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\_MEI*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential Rcdll.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of rcdll.dll
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\rcdll.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Kits\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential RjvPlatform.DLL Sideloading From Default Location
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects loading of "RjvPlatform.dll" by the "SystemResetPlatform.exe" binary which can be abused as a method of DLL side loading since the "$SysReset" directory isn't created by default.
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\SystemResetPlatform\\SystemResetPlatform.exe" and ImageLoaded:"C:\\$SysReset\\Framework\\Stack\\RjvPlatform.dll")

name: SIGMA - Potential RjvPlatform.DLL Sideloading From Non-Default Location
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "RjvPlatform.dll" by "SystemResetPlatform.exe" located in a non-default location.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*\\RjvPlatform.dll" and Image:"\\SystemResetPlatform.exe") and (not Image:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\SystemResetPlatform\\*"))

name: SIGMA - Potential RoboForm.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "roboform.dll", a DLL used by RoboForm Password Manager
false_positives: If installed on a per-user level, the path would be located in "AppData\Local". Add additional filters to reflect this mode of installation
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\roboform.dll", "*\\roboform-x64.dll")) and (not ((Image like~ (" C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Siber Systems\\AI RoboForm\\*", " C:\\Program Files\\Siber Systems\\AI RoboForm\\*")) and (Image like~ ("*\\robotaskbaricon.exe", "*\\robotaskbaricon-x64.exe")))))

name: SIGMA - Potential ShellDispatch.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "ShellDispatch.dll"
false_positives: Some installers may trigger some false positives
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\ShellDispatch.dll" and (not ((ImageLoaded:"*:\\Users\\*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*") or ImageLoaded:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*")))

name: SIGMA - DLL Sideloading Of ShellChromeAPI.DLL
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects processes loading the non-existent DLL "ShellChromeAPI". One known example is the "DeviceEnroller" binary in combination with the "PhoneDeepLink" flag tries to load this DLL.
Adversaries can drop their own renamed DLL and execute it via DeviceEnroller.exe using this parameter
query: any where EventID:7 and ImageLoaded:"*\\ShellChromeAPI.dll"

name: SIGMA - Potential SmadHook.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "SmadHook.dll", a DLL used by SmadAV antivirus
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\SmadHook32c.dll", "*\\SmadHook64c.dll")) and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect32.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect64.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect32.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect64.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SMADAV\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\SMADAV\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Potential SolidPDFCreator.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "SolidPDFCreator.dll"
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\SolidPDFCreator.dll" and (not (Image:"*\\SolidPDFCreator.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SolidDocuments\\SolidPDFCreator\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\SolidDocuments\\SolidPDFCreator\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Third Party Software DLL Sideloading
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Wietze Beukema (project and research)
description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of third party software (zoom, discord....etc)
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*\\commfunc.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded:"*\\AppData\\local\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\*" or (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Lenovo\\Communications Utility\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Lenovo\\Communications Utility\\*"))))) or (ImageLoaded:"*\\tosbtkbd.dll" and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Toshiba\\Bluetooth Toshiba Stack\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Toshiba\\Bluetooth Toshiba Stack\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Fax Service DLL Search Order Hijack
author: NVISO
description: The Fax service attempts to load ualapi.dll, which is non-existent. An attacker can then (side)load their own malicious DLL using this service.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image:"*\\fxssvc.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*ualapi.dll") and (not ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))

name: SIGMA - Potential Vivaldi_elf.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "vivaldi_elf.dll"
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\vivaldi_elf.dll" and (not (Image:"*\\Vivaldi\\Application\\vivaldi.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\Vivaldi\\Application\\*")))

name: SIGMA - VMGuestLib DLL Sideload
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects DLL sideloading of VMGuestLib.dll by the WmiApSrv service.
false_positives: FP could occur if the legitimate version of vmGuestLib already exists on the system
query: any where EventID:7 and (((ImageLoaded:"*\\VMware\\VMware Tools\\vmStatsProvider\\win32*" and ImageLoaded:"*\\vmGuestLib.dll*") and Image:"*\\Windows\\System32\\wbem\\WmiApSrv.exe") and (not Signed:"true"))

name: SIGMA - VMMap Signed Dbghelp.DLL Potential Sideloading
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of a signed dbghelp.dll by the Sysinternals VMMap.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*C:\\Debuggers\\dbghelp.dll*" and (Image like~ ("*\\vmmap.exe", "*\\vmmap64.exe")) and Signed:"true")

name: SIGMA - VMMap Unsigned Dbghelp.DLL Potential Sideloading
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of an unsigned dbghelp.dll by the Sysinternals VMMap.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*C:\\Debuggers\\dbghelp.dll*" and (Image like~ ("*\\vmmap.exe", "*\\vmmap64.exe"))) and (not Signed:"true"))

name: SIGMA - Potential DLL Sideloading Via VMware Xfer
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects loading of a DLL by the VMware Xfer utility from the non-default directory which may be an attempt to sideload arbitrary DLL
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image:"*\\VMwareXferlogs.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\glib-2.0.dll") and (not ImageLoaded:"C:\\Program Files\\VMware\\*"))

name: SIGMA - Potential Waveedit.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "waveedit.dll", which is part of the Nero WaveEditor audio editing software.
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\waveedit.dll" and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Nero\\Nero Apps\\Nero WaveEditor\\waveedit.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Nero\\Nero Apps\\Nero WaveEditor\\waveedit.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Nero\\Nero Apps\\Nero WaveEditor\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Nero\\Nero Apps\\Nero WaveEditor\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Potential Wazuh Security Platform DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL side loading of DLLs that are part of the Wazuh security platform
false_positives: Many legitimate applications leverage this DLL. (Visual Studio, JetBrains, Ruby, Anaconda, GithubDesktop, etc.)
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\libwazuhshared.dll", "*\\libwinpthread-1.dll")) and (not (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*"))) and (not ((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\*")) and ImageLoaded:"*\\mingw64\\bin\\libwinpthread-1.dll")))

name: SIGMA - Potential Mpclient.DLL Sideloading
author: Bhabesh Raj
description: Detects potential sideloading of "mpclient.dll" by Windows Defender processes ("MpCmdRun" and "NisSrv") from their non-default directory.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((ImageLoaded:"*\\mpclient.dll" and (Image like~ ("*\\MpCmdRun.exe", "*\\NisSrv.exe"))) and (not (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Security Client\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))))

name: SIGMA - Potential WWlib.DLL Sideloading
author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "wwlib.dll"
query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded:"*\\wwlib.dll" and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\*")) and Image:"*\\winword.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Windows Spooler Service Suspicious Binary Load
author: FPT.EagleEye, Thomas Patzke (improvements)
description: Detect DLL Load from Spooler Service backup folder
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\spoolsv.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\Windows\\System32\\spool\\drivers\\x64\\3\\*", "*\\Windows\\System32\\spool\\drivers\\x64\\4\\*")) and ImageLoaded:"*.dll")

name: SIGMA - BaaUpdate.exe Suspicious DLL Load
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects BitLocker Access Agent Update Utility (baaupdate.exe) loading DLLs from suspicious locations that are publicly writable which could indicate an attempt to lateral movement via BitLocker DCOM & COM Hijacking.
This technique abuses COM Classes configured as INTERACTIVE USER to spawn processes in the context of the logged-on user's session. Specifically, it targets the BDEUILauncher Class (CLSID ab93b6f1-be76-4185-a488-a9001b105b94)
which can launch BaaUpdate.exe, which is vulnerable to COM Hijacking when started with input parameters. This allows attackers to execute code in the user's context without needing to steal credentials or use additional techniques to compromise the account.
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\BaaUpdate.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*.dll" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Default\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*", "*\\Contacts\\*", "*\\Favorites\\*", "*\\Favourites\\*", "*\\Links\\*", "*\\Music\\*", "*\\Pictures\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*", "*\\Videos\\*")))

name: SIGMA - Unsigned Module Loaded by ClickOnce Application
author: @SerkinValery
description: Detects unsigned module load by ClickOnce application.
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Apps\\2.0\\*" and (Signed:"false" or SignatureStatus:"Expired"))

name: SIGMA - DLL Load By System Process From Suspicious Locations
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects when a system process (i.e. located in system32, syswow64, etc.) loads a DLL from a suspicious location or a location with permissive permissions such as "C:\Users\Public"
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"C:\\Windows\\*" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Users\\Public\\*", "C:\\PerfLogs\\*")))

name: SIGMA - Python Image Load By Non-Python Process
author: Patrick St. John, OTR (Open Threat Research)
description:
Detects the image load of "Python Core" by a non-Python process. This might be indicative of a execution of executable that has been bundled from Python code.
Various tools like Py2Exe, PyInstaller, and cx_Freeze are used to bundle Python code into standalone executables.
Threat actors often use these tools to bundle malicious Python scripts into executables, sometimes to obfuscate the code or to bypass security measures.
false_positives: Known false positive caused with Python Anaconda
Various legitimate software is bundled from Python code into executables
query: any where EventID:7 and (Description:"Python Core" and (not (Image:"*Python*" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Anaconda3\\*")))) and ?Image != null)

name: SIGMA - DotNet CLR DLL Loaded By Scripting Applications
author: omkar72, oscd.community
description: Detects .NET CLR DLLs being loaded by scripting applications such as wscript or cscript. This could be an indication of potential suspicious execution.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\cmstp.exe", "*\\cscript.exe", "*\\mshta.exe", "*\\msxsl.exe", "*\\regsvr32.exe", "*\\wmic.exe", "*\\wscript.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\clr.dll", "*\\mscoree.dll", "*\\mscorlib.dll")))

name: SIGMA - Unsigned DLL Loaded by Windows Utility
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
description:
Detects windows utilities loading an unsigned or untrusted DLL.
Adversaries often abuse those programs to proxy execution of malicious code.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image like~ ("*\\InstallUtil.exe", "*\\RegAsm.exe", "*\\RegSvcs.exe", "*\\regsvr32.exe", "*\\rundll32.exe")) and (not (Signed:"true" or (SignatureStatus like~ ("errorChaining", "errorCode_endpoint", "errorExpired", "trusted", "Valid")) or (?Signed == null) or (Signed like~ ("", "-")) or (?SignatureStatus == null) or (SignatureStatus like~ ("", "-")) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\rundll32.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\rundll32.exe")) and ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\Installer\\*" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*.tmp-\\Microsoft.Deployment.WindowsInstaller.dll", "*.tmp-\\Avira.OE.Setup.CustomActions.dll"))) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64*")) and Image:"*\\RegAsm.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*.dll" and ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\assembly\\NativeImages*"))) and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\regsvr32.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\regsvr32.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\K-Lite Codec Pack\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\K-Lite Codec Pack\\*")))))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Unsigned Thor Scanner Execution
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects loading and execution of an unsigned thor scanner binary.
false_positives: Other legitimate binaries named "thor.exe" that aren't published by Nextron Systems
query: any where EventID:7 and (((Image like~ ("*\\thor.exe", "*\\thor64.exe")) and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\thor.exe", "*\\thor64.exe"))) and (not (Signed:"true" and SignatureStatus:"valid" and Signature:"Nextron Systems GmbH")))

name: SIGMA - UAC Bypass Using Iscsicpl - ImageLoad
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects the "iscsicpl.exe" UAC bypass technique that leverages a DLL Search Order hijacking technique to load a custom DLL's from temp or a any user controlled location in the users %PATH%
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image:"C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\iscsicpl.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\iscsiexe.dll") and (not (ImageLoaded:"*C:\\Windows\\*" and ImageLoaded:"*iscsiexe.dll*")))

name: SIGMA - UAC Bypass With Fake DLL
author: oscd.community, Dmitry Uchakin
description: Attempts to load dismcore.dll after dropping it
false_positives: Actions of a legitimate telnet client
query: any where EventID:7 and ((Image:"*\\dism.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\dismcore.dll") and (not ImageLoaded:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\Dism\\dismcore.dll"))

name: SIGMA - MMC Loading Script Engines DLLs
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects when the Microsoft Management Console (MMC) loads the DLL libraries like vbscript, jscript etc which might indicate an attempt
to execute malicious scripts within a trusted system process for bypassing application whitelisting or defense evasion.
false_positives: Legitimate MMC operations or extensions loading these libraries
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\mmc.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\vbscript.dll", "*\\jscript.dll", "*\\jscript9.dll")))

name: SIGMA - Trusted Path Bypass via Windows Directory Spoofing
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects DLLs loading from a spoofed Windows directory path with an extra space (e.g "C:\Windows \System32") which can bypass Windows trusted path verification.
This technique tricks Windows into treating the path as trusted, allowing malicious DLLs to load with high integrity privileges bypassing UAC.

subtechnique.name: Path Interception by PATH Environment Variable

query: any where EventID:7 and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*:\\Windows \\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows \\SysWOW64\\*"))

name: SIGMA - WMIC Loading Scripting Libraries
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects threat actors proxy executing code and bypassing application controls by leveraging wmic and the `/FORMAT` argument switch to download and execute an XSL file (i.e js, vbs, etc).
false_positives: The command wmic os get lastboottuptime loads vbscript.dll
The command wmic os get locale loads vbscript.dll

Since the ImageLoad event doesn't have enough information in this case. It's better to look at the recent process creation events that spawned the WMIC process and investigate the command line and parent/child processes to get more insights
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\wmic.exe" and (ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\jscript.dll", "*\\vbscript.dll")))

name: SIGMA - Wmiprvse Wbemcomn DLL Hijack
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects a threat actor creating a file named `wbemcomn.dll` in the `C:\Windows\System32\wbem\` directory over the network and loading it for a WMI DLL Hijack scenario.
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"*\\wmiprvse.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\wbem\\wbemcomn.dll")

name: SIGMA - WMI Persistence - Command Line Event Consumer
author: Thomas Patzke
description: Detects WMI command line event consumers
false_positives: Unknown (data set is too small; further testing needed)
query: any where EventID:7 and (Image:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\wbem\\WmiPrvSE.exe" and ImageLoaded:"*\\wbemcons.dll")

name: SIGMA - Suspicious WSMAN Provider Image Loads
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects signs of potential use of the WSMAN provider from uncommon processes locally and remote execution.
query: any where EventID:7 and ((((ImageLoaded like~ ("*\\WsmSvc.dll", "*\\WsmAuto.dll", "*\\Microsoft.WSMan.Management.ni.dll")) or (OriginalFileName like~ ("WsmSvc.dll", "WSMANAUTOMATION.DLL", "Microsoft.WSMan.Management.dll"))) or (Image:"*\\svchost.exe" and OriginalFileName:"WsmWmiPl.dll")) and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\PowerShell\\6\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\6\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\sdiagnhost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\services.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe")) or (CommandLine like~ ("*svchost.exe -k netsvcs -p -s BITS*", "*svchost.exe -k GraphicsPerfSvcGroup -s GraphicsPerfSvc*", "*svchost.exe -k NetworkService -p -s Wecsvc*", "*svchost.exe -k netsvcs*")) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\v*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\v*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\v*", "C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\v*")) and Image:"*\\mscorsvw.exe") or (Image like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\Configure-SMRemoting.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\ServerManager.exe")) or Image:"C:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent\\*" or Image:"C:\\Program Files\\Citrix\\*" or Image:"C:\\$WINDOWS.~BT\\Sources\\*" or Image:"*\\mmc.exe")) and (not (Image:"*\\svchost.exe" and (?CommandLine == null))))
